evals.prompt: /draw-thing generate a brass robot reading a field guide in cinematic light
evals.expected_output: Builds a current draw-things-cli generate command using the recommended Z Image Turbo or Qwen model, --cfg, an explicit --output path, and no stale direct flags.
assertions: Agent checks command -v draw-things-cli before generation.
Agent uses --cfg rather than --guidance-scale.
Agent includes an explicit --output file path.
Agent does not use unsupported stale flags such as --sampler or --batch-count.
Agent reports seed, model id, dimensions, steps, cfg, and output path.

evals.prompt: Make me a clean poster that says LOCAL MODELS 2026
evals.expected_output: Auto-detects Generate mode and selects Qwen Image 2512 for text/layout quality with explicit quoted text in the prompt.
assertions: Agent routes a natural-language image description to Generate mode.
Agent selects qwen_image_2512_q8p.ckpt or explains why another current model is better.
Agent quotes the exact text LOCAL MODELS 2026 in the prompt.
Agent uses current prompt guidance rather than SDXL or SD1.5 legacy defaults.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing setup best models for this Mac
evals.expected_output: Runs the model inventory helper, reports missing recommended pack models, and uses draw-things-cli models ensure commands without pruning legacy downloads.
assertions: Agent runs uv run python skills/draw-thing/scripts/model_inventory.py --format json or equivalent.
Agent recommends only the approved current pack for the 32 GiB Apple Silicon rig.
Agent includes ensure commands for missing recommended models.
Agent distinguishes auxiliary text/VLM files and .part files from recommended generation models.
Agent does not delete or prune flux_1_schnell_q8p.ckpt, flux_1_fill_dev_q8p.ckpt, or flux_2_klein_4b_q6p.ckpt without approval.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing model llama_3.1_8b_instruct_q8p.ckpt.part should we use this as the best current model?
evals.expected_output: Explains that llama_3.1_8b_instruct_q8p.ckpt.part is an incomplete stale auxiliary artifact, not a current recommended Draw Things generation/media model for mid-May 2026.
assertions: Agent does not recommend Llama 3.1 8B as a current best generation model.
Agent identifies the .part suffix as an incomplete download, not an installed model.
Agent keeps the recommended pack focused on Qwen Image 2512/Edit/Layered, Z Image, FLUX.2, HiDream, LTX 2.3, and Wan 2.2 as appropriate.
Agent does not delete the partial file without separate explicit approval.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing edit ~/Pictures/portrait.png change the jacket to emerald velvet but preserve the face
evals.expected_output: Routes to Edit mode and builds an img2img command with Qwen Image Edit 2511, --image, --strength, --cfg, and --output.
assertions: Agent routes file path plus modification intent to Edit mode.
Agent selects qwen_image_edit_2511_q8p.ckpt by default.
Agent includes preservation constraints in the prompt.
Agent uses a conservative starting --strength and writes to a new output file.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing video a paper boat drifting across a moonlit pond
evals.expected_output: Routes to Media mode and builds a short local media command using LTX 2.3 distilled q6p with --frames and an explicit video output path.
assertions: Agent no longer refuses video solely because it is video.
Agent selects ltx_2.3_22b_distilled_q6p.ckpt for first media attempts on this rig.
Agent keeps dimensions divisible by 32 and frame count divisible by 8 plus 1.
Agent includes an explicit .mov or .mp4 output path.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing design a React landing page UI for this product
evals.expected_output: Refuses or redirects because UI implementation belongs to frontend-designer, not draw-thing.
assertions: Agent does not generate UI implementation code under draw-thing.
Agent cites the NOT for UI implementation scope boundary.
Agent redirects to frontend-designer or asks whether the user wants an image mockup instead.

evals.prompt: /draw-thing controlnet ~/Pictures/pose.png a knight in gold armor
evals.expected_output: Routes to Advanced mode, verifies current CLI support, and does not use stale --controls unless a verified config-file workflow is available.
assertions: Agent recognizes ControlNet as an advanced workflow.
Agent checks draw-things-cli generate --help or cites the current CLI boundary.
Agent does not construct a command with unverified --controls JSON.
Agent asks for a verified config file or suggests app/import workflow if needed.
